name: Burgundy Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Burgundy or Other Red Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, red wine, finely chopped onion, Worcestershire sauce, seasoned salt, pepper, and garlic salt until well combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
3. Broil or grill the patties, keeping them 4-inches from the heat source. Turn once to achieve the desired doneness, which should take approximately 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Serve on toasted buns with your favorite toppings.
